📄 Complete Details & Notification

The SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 has been released by the Staff Selection Commission (SSC).

As per the latest updates, the final marks and scorecard were made available on February 17, 2026, at the official website ssc.gov.in. This follows the declaration of the SSC GD final result on January 15, 2026.

FOLLOW US

Candidates who appeared in the PST/PET and DV/DME/RME stages can now download their SSC GD final scorecard 2025 using their registration number and password. The scorecard displays normalized CBT marks and overall qualifying status after all recruitment stages. The download window is limited - typically a short period - so act quickly before the link deactivates.

Key Highlights:

  • Release Date: February 17, 2026
  • Last Date to Download: March 1, 2026 (till 6:00 PM)
  • Access: Online only via ssc.gov.in login
  • Purpose: View final marks, compare with cut-offs, and save for records/joining

SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 Overview

Particular Details
Exam Name Constable (GD) in CAPFs, SSF, NIA, Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles, and Sepoy in NCB Examination 2025
Conducting Body Staff Selection Commission (SSC)
Final Result Status Declared on January 15, 2026
Scorecard Status Released on February 17, 2026
Mode of Scorecard Online only
Login Credentials Registration number / Username and Password (plus captcha if required)
Official Website ssc.gov.in

Visit the Staff Selection Commission (SSC) official website – ssc.gov.in

Important Dates: SSC GD Final Result and Scorecard 2025

Event Date/Details
CBT Exam Dates February 4 to 25, 2025
PET/PST and Medical Stages Conducted post-CBT shortlisting
Final Result Declaration January 15, 2026
Final Scorecard Release February 17, 2026
Last Date to Download Scorecard March 1, 2026 (6:00 PM)

Direct Link to Check SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Candidates can access the SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 through the direct link on the SSC portal under the “Result/Marks” section after logging in. The portal may redirect from legacy links, but use ssc.gov.in primarily.

SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 – Direct Link (Active)
(Login required at ssc.gov.in for marks download)

Step-by-Step Guide to Download SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  1. Visit the official Staff Selection Commission website: ssc.gov.in.
  2. Click on the “Login” or “Candidate Login” button on the homepage.
  3. Enter your registration number/username, password, and captcha (if prompted).
  4. After logging in, navigate to the “Result/Marks” tab on your dashboard.
  5. Select “Constable (GD) in CAPFs, SSF, NIA and Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles Examination 2025” from the list.
  6. Click on the “SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025” or “Marks” link to view your details.
  7. Your final scorecard will display on screen - review marks, cut-off comparison, and status.
  8. Download the PDF and print it for future reference (e.g., document verification). Save it promptly, as access ends after the deadline.
  9. (Use the direct link mentioned above to reach the login faster if available.)

Details Mentioned on SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Your scorecard typically includes:

  • Candidate’s name, roll number, registration number
  • Category/sub-category (UR, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, etc.)
  • Exam name and applied post
  • Section-wise marks (General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Knowledge & General Awareness, Elementary Mathematics, English/Hindi)
  • Raw and normalized marks
  • Total marks in CBT (considered for final merit after qualifying PET/PST and medical)
  • Qualifying status (selected/not selected) and any remarks
  • Note on limited availability window

SSC GD Final Cut Off and Merit List 2025

The SSC GD final cut off 2025 was released with the final result on January 15, 2026, and is force-wise, state-wise, category-wise, and gender-wise. It appears in the official result PDF write-up.

Your scorecard marks should be compared to the relevant cut-off for your category/force/state to assess selection. The merit list PDF lists roll numbers of provisionally selected candidates (around 50,047 selected against vacancies), while the scorecard provides individual marks for those who reached physical/medical stages.

(Refer to the official SSC result PDFs for exact cut-off tables - examples range from ~104 to 152+ depending on category/force.)

What to Do After Downloading SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Selected candidates: Keep multiple printouts/PDFs of the scorecard and final result for document verification, joining, and force allocation.

Verify details (name, roll number, category, etc.) - report serious discrepancies to SSC regional offices promptly.

Non-selected candidates: Use marks for performance analysis and preparation for future SSC exams.

Download and save copies early - the window closes after the last date.

SSC GD Selection Process 2025 (Short Overview)

The process included:

  • Computer-Based Test (CBT): Four sections totaling 160 marks.
  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET) and Physical Standard Test (PST): Qualifying.
  • Detailed Medical Examination (DME)/Review Medical Examination (RME): Qualifying.
  • Final merit based on normalized CBT marks (for qualified candidates), followed by force/state allocation per vacancies and preferences.

The final scorecard reflects CBT performance post-qualifying stages, available briefly post-result.

Important Links for SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  • SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 Download: ssc.gov.in (login to Result/Marks)
  • SSC GD Final Result 2025 Merit List PDF: Available on ssc.gov.in under Results
  • SSC GD Final Cut Off 2025 PDF: In final result write-up on ssc.gov.in
  • SSC Official Website: ssc.gov.in

  • Bags and pouches
  • Bluetooth devices and earphones

Important Instructions for MPESB ITI Training Officer Exam 2026

Before Exam Day:

  • Download admit card 2-3 days before exam date
  • Check exam center location on Google Maps
  • Plan your route and transportation
  • Arrange all required documents in advance
  • Keep backup copies of admit card
  • Read exam instructions carefully

On Exam Day:

  • Reach exam center 45-60 minutes before reporting time
  • Entry closes 30 minutes before exam starts (No late entry allowed)
  • Follow dress code if specified in admit card
  • Carry water and light snacks for outside exam hall
  • Keep calm and focused

During Exam:

  • Follow all invigilator instructions carefully
  • Fill OMR sheet with black/blue ballpoint pen only (if applicable)
  • Manage your time wisely for all sections
  • Don't panic if questions seem difficult
  • Review answers if time permits
  • Don't carry prohibited items inside exam hall

What If MPESB ITI Training Officer Admit Card Not Available?

If you're unable to download your MPESB ITI Training Officer Admit Card 2026, try these solutions:

  1. Solution 1: Clear browser cache and cookies, then try again with a fresh session
  2. Solution 2: Try different web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Microsoft Edge, Safari)
  3. Solution 3: Check your application status on the official website to verify if your application was accepted
  4. Solution 4: Contact MPESB helpdesk immediately

Important: Act immediately if facing issues downloading admit card. Don't wait until exam day. Contact MPESB helpdesk at least 2 days before the exam.

RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 Notification Released: Railway Recruitment Boards have announced CEN 01/2026 for 11,127 Assistant Loco Pilot vacancies across Indian Railways with a starting salary of ₹19,900 per month (Level 2, 7th CPC). 

FOLLOW US

This bumper railway vacancy is a major opportunity for candidates preparing for latest Railway Govt Jobs as well as state-wise railway jobs, because applications for RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 can be submitted online for any participating RRB including Ahmedabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Mumbai, Secunderabad and others.

Candidates aged 18-30 years can apply online from 15 May to 14 June 2026 through rrbapply.gov.in.

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 Overview

Company Name Indian Railways – Railway Recruitment Boards (RRB)
Post Name Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP)
No of Posts 11,127 (All Railways)
Advt No CEN No. 01/2026
Salary Pay Level-2 as per 7th CPC | Initial Pay: ₹19,900/- Per Month
Qualification As per Detailed CEN No. 01/2026 (Post-wise Education Qualification & Medical Standard)
Age Limit 18 to 30 Years (as on 01.07.2026)
Start Date for Apply 15-05-2026
Last Date for Apply 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs)
Official Website rrbapply.gov.in

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF

Candidates who are interested in applying for the RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

Download RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Job 2026 Short Notification PDF

Latest Railway Job Notifications 2026

RRC Western Railway Apprentice 2026 - 5349 Posts | Apply Online
South Central Railway Apprentice 2026 - 2801 Posts | Apply Online
MMRDA Recruitment 2026 - 235 AE, JE & More Posts | Apply Now
KRCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - 190 Posts | Apply Online
Rail Wheel Factory Apprentice 2026 - 192 Posts | Apply Offline

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details

Post Name Total Vacancies (All Railways)
Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) 11,127

Eligibility Criteria

  • Qualifications: As per the detailed CEN No. 01/2026. Post-wise Education Qualification and Medical Standards will be published exclusively on the official websites of the participating RRBs.
  • Age Limit: 18 to 30 years as on 01.07.2026. Age relaxation as per Railway rules will be applicable as mentioned in the detailed CEN.
  • Candidates are advised to verify their primary details using Aadhaar during filing of the online application to avoid inconvenience and delays due to special detailed scrutiny at every stage of recruitment process for Non-Aadhaar verified applications.
  • Name and Date of Birth in Aadhaar shall be updated to match 100% with the Full Name and Date of Birth available in the 10th class pass certificate. Aadhaar also needs to be updated with the latest photo and latest biometrics (Fingerprint & Iris) before filling the online application.
  • All terms, conditions, eligibility criteria, procedures and other requirements governing the recruitment shall be strictly as per the detailed CEN No. 01/2026 (along with any corrigendum) to be published on the official websites of the RRBs.

Salary / Stipend

  • Post: Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP)
  • Pay Level: Level-2 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix
  • Initial Pay: ₹19,900/- per month
  • Other allowances and benefits as applicable to Railway employees under 7th CPC will be as per detailed CEN No. 01/2026.

Age Limit (as on 01-07-2026)

  • Minimum Age: 18 Years
  • Maximum Age: 30 Years
  • Age is reckoned as on 01.07.2026.
  • Age relaxation for SC/ST, OBC, Ex-Servicemen, PwBD and other eligible categories will be as per Railway rules mentioned in the detailed CEN No. 01/2026.

Application Fee

  • Application fee details are not mentioned in this Indicative (Short) Notification. Fee details will be published in the detailed CEN No. 01/2026 on the official websites of the participating RRBs.
  • Applications must be submitted through Online Mode Only at https://www.rrbapply.gov.in.

Important Dates

Event Date
Notification (Indicative) Publication Date 21-03-2026
Opening Date of Application 15-05-2026
Closing Date for Submission of Application 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs)

How to Apply

  • Applications must be submitted Through Online Mode Only. Visit https://www.rrbapply.gov.in to fill and submit the online application form.
  • The Opening Date of Application is 15-05-2026 and the Closing Date is 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs).
  • Before filling the application, ensure that your Aadhaar details (Name and Date of Birth) match 100% with your 10th class pass certificate and that Aadhaar is updated with the latest photo and biometrics.
  • Candidates of all participating RRBs must apply through the centralized portal: https://www.rrbapply.gov.in.
  • Detailed application procedure, fee payment process, and step-by-step instructions will be available in the Detailed CEN No. 01/2026 to be published on the official websites of the RRBs.
  • Candidates may also visit the website of their respective RRB for region-specific information and updates. Participating RRB websites include: rrbahmedabad.gov.in, rrbajmer.gov.in, rrbbnc.gov.in, rrbbbhopal.gov.in, rrbbbs.gov.in, rrbbilaspur.gov.in, rrbcdg.gov.in, rrbchennai.gov.in, rrbgkp.gov.in, rrbguwahati.gov.in, rrbjammu.nic.in, rrbkolkata.gov.in, rrbmalda.gov.in, rrbmumbai.gov.in, rrbmuzaffarpur.gov.in, rrbpatna.gov.in, rrbpryj.gov.in, rrbranchi.gov.in, rrbsecunderabad.gov.in, rrbsiliguri.gov.in, rrbthiruvananthapuram.gov.in.

Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) under Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India has published the detailed advertisement for recruitment of 404 Sportspersons as Constable (General Duty) under Sports Quota for the year 2026. Online applications are invited from eligible Male & Female candidates for filling up these Group 'C' Non-Gazetted, (Non-Ministerial) Combatised posts. The recruitment is temporary but likely to be continued. Candidates with outstanding sports achievements in various disciplines can apply online. The last date for submission of online applications will be 30 days from the date of publication of this advertisement in Employment News.

The notification contains complete details regarding vacancies discipline-wise, eligibility criteria, age relaxation, sports achievements required, selection process, physical standards, medical examination and application procedure. SSB Constable GD Sports Quota Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill the following eligibility conditions as on the last date of receipt of applications:

Sports Qualification (Order of Preference):

  • Medal winners in Senior/Junior National Championships, OR
  • Medal winners in Khelo India Youth/University/Winter/Para Games, OR
  • Medal winners in SGFI, OR
  • Represented University in Inter-University Tournaments, OR

Final Merit: Based on Sports Achievement marks + Field Trial (where applicable) + Medical Fitness.

How to Apply for SSB Constable GD Sports Quota 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the official SSB Recruitment website www.recruitment.ssb.gov.in. Candidates should follow the instructions carefully while filling Part-I (Details), Part-II (Photo, Signature & Documents upload) and Part-III (Payment).

Important Instructions for SSB Constable GD Sports Quota Candidates

  • Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of documentation.

  • Selected candidates will be governed under New Pension Scheme (NPS).
  • Performance of selected sportspersons will be reviewed periodically.
  • SSB reserves the right to cancel/postpone the recruitment without any reason.
  • PwD candidates are not eligible for this recruitment.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Indian Army HQ 2 Signal Training Centre, Panaji, Goa has released the official Civilian Switch Board Operator (CSBO) Grade-II, Group 'C' Notification 2026 on 02 May 2026 at the official website indianarmy.nic.in. A total of 190 vacancies have been announced under the CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 and 25 years with a qualification of Matriculation (10th) and minimum 6 months experience in handling Private Board Exchange (PBX) Board can apply via email from 02 May 2026 to 31 May 2026. The official notification PDF and email application instructions are available below.

FOLLOW US

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

The Headquarters 2 Signal Training Centre, Panaji, Goa (Indian Army / Ministry of Defence, Government of India) has officially released the Employment Notice for recruitment to 190 posts of Civilian Switch Board Operator (CSBO) Grade-II, Group 'C' on probation for a period of two years followed by permanent absorption subject to satisfactory performance. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, age criteria, selection process, examination scheme, reservation norms, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification before applying. The notification PDF is available on the official Indian Army recruitment page.

  • Download Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organisation Name HQ 2 Signal Training Centre, Panaji, Goa - Indian Army, Ministry of Defence, Govt. of India
Employment Notice No. Advt_020526 dated 02/05/2026
Post Name Civilian Switch Board Operator (CSBO) Grade-II, Group 'C'
Department Ministry of Defence, Government of India
Service Liability All India Service Liability including Field Service
Total Vacancies 190 (including 12 PwBD posts and 20 ESM posts - Horizontal Reservation)
Pay Scale Rs. 21,700/- + allowances (Level-3, Cell-1 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix)
Application Mode Online only - via official email ID: [email protected] (PDF application form submitted as email attachment)
Selection Mode Written Test (100 marks) + Practical Test (Qualifying) + Interview (Qualifying) + Medical Test
Mandatory Requirement Minimum 6 months experience in handling Private Board Exchange (PBX) Board - Experience Certificate mandatory
Official Email [email protected]

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date & Time
Opening Date and Time of Online Application 02-05-2026 (0001 Hrs)
Last Date and Time for Receipt of Online Application 31-05-2026 (2359 Hrs)
Written Test / Practical Test / Interview Date To be intimated to eligible candidates through call letters via registered email ID only
Age Calculated As On 31-05-2026 (Last date of receipt of application)

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 190 vacancies have been announced for the post of Civilian Switch Board Operator (CSBO) Grade-II, Group 'C'. These are distributed across UR, SC, ST, OBC, and EWS categories as vertical reservation. Additionally, 12 posts are horizontally reserved for PwBD candidates and 20 posts are horizontally reserved for Ex-Servicemen (ESM) as per DoPT OM No. 36035/02/2017/Estt (Res) dated 15 Jan 2018.

Post Name Total Posts PwBD (Horizontal) ESM (Horizontal)
CSBO Grade-II 190 12 20

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of application (31-05-2026). Only citizens of India are eligible to apply. Proficiency in handling Private Board Exchange (PBX) Board with a minimum experience of 6 months is a crucial and mandatory criterion - no application will be accepted without a valid Experience Certificate in handling PBX Board. The post is subject to All India Service Liability including Field Service.

Educational Qualification

Qualification Type Details
Essential Qualification (i) Matric or equivalent from a recognized Board
Essential Qualification (ii) Proficiency in handling Private Board Exchange (PBX) Board with minimum 6 months experience (Experience Certificate mandatory)
Desirable Fluency in spoken English and Hindi

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Candidates must be between 18 and 25 years of age as on the last date of receipt of application (31-05-2026). Age relaxations are available for reserved categories and special groups as specified below. The crucial date for determining the age limit shall be the last date of receipt of application. No extra weightage will be given for additional/extra/higher qualifications for recruitment.

Category Age Limit / Relaxation
General (UR) / EWS 18 to 25 years (as on 31-05-2026)
OBC 3 years relaxation (max 28 years)
SC / ST 5 years relaxation (max 30 years)
PwBD (UR/EWS) 10 years relaxation (max 35 years)
PwBD (OBC) 13 years relaxation (10 + 3 years)
PwBD (SC/ST) 15 years relaxation (10 + 5 years)
Ex-Servicemen Additional 3 years relaxation (over and above actual military service rendered)
Departmental Candidates (with 3 years continuous service) Up to 40 years (45 years for SC/ST candidates)

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

The official notification does not specify any application fee for Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026. No fee details have been mentioned in the Employment Notice. Candidates are advised to check the official notification carefully and contact the official email ID [email protected] for any fee-related clarifications. No TA/DA is admissible for appearing in Written Test, Practical Test, and Interview - candidates must make their own arrangements for boarding/lodging at 2 STC, Goa.

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 consists of 3 stages - Written Test (100 marks, merit-based), Practical Test (qualifying only), and Interview (qualifying only), followed by a Medical Test for shortlisted candidates. Selection will be made strictly on the basis of merit in the Written Test, subject to the candidate qualifying in the Practical Test and Interview. To reduce the number of candidates for the Written Examination, screening of applications may be carried out based on percentage of marks obtained in Matriculation/10th Board examination.

Stage 1 - Written Test (100 Marks - Merit Based)

Part Subject Type Marks
Part-I General Intelligence & Numerical Aptitude Objective Multiple Choice Type 25
Part-II General Awareness Objective Multiple Choice Type 25
Part-III General English Objective Multiple Choice Type 25
Part-IV Logic & Reasoning Objective Multiple Choice Type 25
Total 100

The question paper will be bilingual (English and Hindi). However, questions of General English subject will be in English only. No extra weightage will be given for additional/extra/higher qualifications.

Stage 2 - Practical Test and Interview (Qualifying Only)

Practical Test To check candidate's proficiency in handling exchange operation - Qualifying in nature only (marks not counted for merit)
Interview Conducted along with Practical Test for qualifying purpose only - marks not counted for final merit

Stage 3 - Medical Test

Medical Test Only shortlisted candidates based on performance in Written Test, Practical Test, and Interview will be directed to undergo Medical Test as per extant Government Orders

Terms of Engagement

Probation Period 2 years probation followed by permanent absorption subject to satisfactory performance
Pension New entrants joining on or after 01 Jan 2004 are governed by the National Pension System
Retention Beyond 55 Years / 30 Years of Service Subject to screening committee approval; retirement from service on attaining age of 60 years if retained
Disqualification Candidate will be disqualified if found to have contracted a marriage while having a living spouse, or entered into another marriage

Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Exam Syllabus

The Written Test consists of 4 parts - General Intelligence & Numerical Aptitude, General Awareness, General English, and Logic & Reasoning - each carrying 25 marks (total 100 marks), all Objective Multiple Choice Type. The question paper is bilingual (English and Hindi) except the General English section which is in English only. After the Written Test, shortlisted candidates undergo a Practical Test and Interview (both qualifying in nature) to assess proficiency in handling exchange/PBX Board operations.

Part Topic Marks
Part-I General Intelligence & Numerical Aptitude 25
Part-II General Awareness 25
Part-III General English 25
Part-IV Logic & Reasoning 25

How to Apply for Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the official email ID [email protected]. Hard copy applications sent by post will not be accepted. The application window is open from 02-05-2026 (0001 Hrs) to 31-05-2026 (2359 Hrs). Candidates must open the PDF application form in Adobe Acrobat Reader ONLY - do NOT open in browser (Chrome/Edge) as fields may not work. All fields marked with * are mandatory and must not be left blank. All text must be typed in BLOCK LETTERS (CAPITALS).

Candidates should not send their application more than once. Incomplete or wrongly named applications will be rejected without notice. Applications with missing attachments, unsigned forms, or mismatched information will be summarily rejected. Candidates must carry originals of all documents for verification while appearing for examination along with two additional self-attested photographs. For difficulties in filling the application form, candidates may send a screenshot of the issue to [email protected].

Documents to be Submitted Along with Application (as self-attested attachments to email):

  • Birth Certificate (Matriculation Certificate/Mark Sheet can be produced in lieu)
  • Educational Certificate - Matriculation Passing Certificate and Mark Sheet
  • Experience Certificate in handling PBX/EPABX Board (minimum 6 months duration - mandatory)
  • Residential Certificate
  • Domicile Certificate
  • Aadhaar Card (mandatory); PAN Card (optional)
  • Caste/Category Certificate in prescribed format (for all reserved categories - SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD)
  • Discharge Certificate (mandatory for Ex-Servicemen candidates, in addition to category certificate)
  • No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer (if already a Government servant)
  • Passport size photograph (JPG file - latest, not older than 3 months; saved as PHOTO_YourFullName.jpg)
  • Signed application form saved as CSBO_YourFullName.pdf

Applications must be emailed to: [email protected] with the subject line: CSBO Application – YOUR FULL NAME

Applications must be addressed to: The Commandant, Headquarters, 2 Signal Training Centre, Panaji (Goa) – 403001

Official Email for Application: [email protected]

Last Date for Email Submission: 31 May 2026 (2359 Hrs)

Important Instructions for Indian Army CSBO Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Only citizens of India are eligible to apply; the post is subject to All India Service Liability including Field Service.
  • PBX Board handling experience of minimum 6 months is mandatory - no application will be accepted without the Experience Certificate.
  • No hard copy applications will be accepted - submission via official email only ([email protected]).
  • No application fee is required; no TA/DA is admissible for Written Test, Practical Test, and Interview.
  • Do not send your application more than once - incomplete or wrongly named applications will be rejected without notice.
  • Shortlisted candidates will be intimated via call letters sent to their registered email ID only - department not responsible for non-receipt of call letters.
  • Screening of applications may be done based on Matriculation/10th Board marks percentage to reduce the number of candidates for Written Examination.
  • Merely fulfilling the basic selection criteria does not automatically entitle a person to be called for test/interview.
  • Persons working in Central/State Govt/PSU must apply through proper channel with NOC from their establishment.
  • Ex-Servicemen candidates must enclose self-attested photocopy of complete discharge book along with the undertaking format provided with the application.
  • EWS candidates must provide income/asset certificate from the competent authority.
  • Candidates must carry originals of all documents for verification while appearing for examination along with two additional self-attested photographs.
  • Falsification of documents at any stage will lead to cancellation of candidature.
  • Attempts to influence the selection process or use of unfair means (forgery, impersonation, false information) may lead to termination of candidature or legal action.
  • The Appointing Authority has the right to cancel/postpone/suspend/terminate/modify the notification without prior notice at any stage.
  • Recruitment Board's decision will be final in all matters.

Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has published Advertisement No. 04/2026 inviting online recruitment applications (ORA) for direct recruitment by selection to various prestigious Group ‘A’ and Group ‘B’ Gazetted posts under different Ministries and Departments of the Government of India. Applications are invited from eligible Indian citizens for filling up these posts on a permanent basis. The last date for submission of online applications is 29th May 2026 (18:00 Hrs). Candidates are strongly advised to read the complete advertisement carefully, including all instructions, before filling the online application form.

The notification provides complete details on vacancies, reservation, pay scales, age limits, essential/desirable qualifications, experience, duties, probation, headquarters, and other conditions. UPSC Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

  • Engineering Faculty Posts require B.E./B.Tech + M.E./M.Tech with first class in relevant discipline.
  • Translator Posts require Bachelor’s Degree in the concerned foreign language or equivalent diploma with English.
  • Administrative & Other Posts require Bachelor’s Degree with relevant experience.
  • PwBD candidates must meet the specified disability criteria.

UPSC Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

  • Final merit list will be prepared after the interview. Minimum qualifying marks apply for each category.

How to Apply for UPSC Advertisement No. 04/2026

Candidates must apply online only using the UPSC ORA portal: https://upsconline.nic.in/ora/. - First register/create profile (URN). - Fill Common Application Form (CAF). - Fill post-specific module. - Upload required documents, photograph, and signature. - Pay fee (if applicable) and submit.

Documents to be Uploaded:

  • Educational certificates, experience certificates, caste/PwBD certificates, etc. in PDF format.

Prerequisites Before Starting the Application

Before logging into the portal, ensure you have the following ready:

  1. Valid Email ID and Mobile Number – These will be used for all future communication and OTP verification.
  2. Scanned Documents (in PDF format, preferably under 1 MB each):
    • Recent passport-size photograph
    • Signature
    • Matriculation/10th certificate (for Date of Birth proof)
    • All educational qualification certificates and mark sheets
    • Experience certificates (if applicable)
    • Caste/Category certificate (OBC/EWS/SC/ST)
    • PwBD certificate (if applicable)
    • Any other supporting documents mentioned in the notification
  3. Details of all educational qualifications and experience chronologically.
  4. Credit/Debit Card or Net Banking details for payment of application fee (if applicable).
  5. Aadhaar Number (recommended for easier registration).

Important Instructions for UPSC Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Applications received after the closing date or incomplete in any respect will be summarily rejected.
  • Candidates must upload clear scanned copies of all supporting documents.
  • Date of birth mentioned in Matriculation certificate will be considered final.
  • Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview and must bring original documents.
  • Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.
  • UPSC reserves the right to cancel/withdraw any post without assigning any reason.

India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited (IIFCL) has published the Assistant General Manager (AGM - Grade C) and Deputy General Manager (DGM - Grade D) Recruitment Notification 2026 on 08 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 09 posts of AGM (Grade C) and 06 posts of DGM (Grade D) on a regular basis across various disciplines. Eligible Indian citizens with the required professional qualifications and post-qualification experience can apply. Applications must be submitted offline by post. The last date for receipt of applications is 08 June 2026. Candidates can access the official notification PDFs and other details below.

FOLLOW US

IIFCL AGM & DGM Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited (IIFCL), a wholly-owned Government of India Company, has officially released Advertisement Nos. IIFCL/HCMD/2026/06 (AGM) and IIFCL/HCMD/2026/05 (DGM) dated 08.05.2026 for direct recruitment to the posts of Assistant General Manager (Grade C) and Deputy General Manager (Grade D). IIFCL is a leading long-term infrastructure lender providing financial assistance to viable infrastructure projects across sectors such as Transportation, Energy, Water & Sanitation, Communication, Social and Commercial Infrastructure. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notifications before applying.

  • Service conditions include attractive pay, perks, and career growth opportunities.

NTPC Limited Assistant Officer Environment Management Recruitment 2026: Get the latest NTPC Limited recruitment notification 2026 for 20 vacancies of Assistant Officer (Environment Management) under Advertisement No. 06A/26. The online application process starts on 8th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 22nd May 2026. Apply through the official NTPC careers website at careers.ntpc.co.in. You can also get OnlyJobs of "Upcoming NTPC Assistant Officer Environment Management Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for NTPC Advt. No. 06A/26 apply online from the NTPC career page.

FOLLOW US

NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

NTPC Limited, India's largest power conglomerate with an installed capacity of 89 GW and a Govt. of India Enterprise, has officially released Advertisement No. 06A/26 for recruitment of 20 Assistant Officers (Environment Management) at Grade E0 for its projects/stations. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, category-wise distribution, educational qualifications, age limit, pay scale, health standards, selection process, application fee, and document requirements. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification carefully before applying online. The notification is available on the official NTPC website.

  • Download NTPC Advt. No. 06A/26 Official Notification PDF

NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 20 vacancies have been announced for the post of Assistant Officer (Environment Management) at Grade E0. These are distributed across UR, EWS, OBC, SC, and ST categories. Reservation for PwBD candidates is as per Govt. Guidelines. The total number of projected vacancies indicated may increase/decrease as per organizational requirement at the discretion of NTPC management.

Category  Number of Posts
UR 08
EWS 02
OBC 05
SC 03
ST 02
Total 20

Identified type of disabilities for the post: (a) B, LV (b) D, HH (c) OA, OL, LC, Dw, AAV (d) ASD (M), SLD, MI (e) MD involving (a) to (d) above.

NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

All qualifications should be full-time from Universities/Institutions recognized and approved in India. SC/ST/PwBD candidates with at least 55% marks in required qualification are eligible to apply for vacancies identified for such categories. All computations of age/experience requirement/qualification etc. shall be done with respect to the last date of receipt of online application. The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed and no benefit of other category will be admissible later.

Educational Qualification

Option Qualification
Option 1 Graduate Engineering Degree in Environment with at least 60% marks.
Option 2 Graduate with at least 60% marks with PG Degree/PG Diploma/M.Sc./M.Tech in Environment Engineering/Environment Science/Environmental Management/M.Tech with specialisation in Environment Engineering/Environment Science/Environmental Management with at least 60% marks from a recognized university/institution.

NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

The upper age limit is 30 years as on the last date of receipt of online application. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government directives.

Category Age Relaxation
General (UR) Maximum 30 years (as on last date of online application)
SC / ST 5 years relaxation
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation
PwBD (Person with Benchmark Disability) 10 years relaxation (cumulative with SC/ST/OBC relaxation as applicable)
Ex-Servicemen As per Govt. guidelines

NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Candidates belonging to General/EWS/OBC category are required to pay a non-refundable application fee of Rs. 500/-. SC/ST/PwBD/XSM category and Female candidates need not pay the application fee. Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are requested to verify their eligibility criteria before paying the application fee.

Category Application Fee
General (UR) / EWS / OBC Candidates Rs. 500/- (Non-refundable)
SC / ST / PwBD / XSM / Female Candidates NIL
Payment Mode (Online) Net Banking / Debit Card / Credit Card - through the online application form
Payment Mode (Offline) State Bank of India - A/C No. 30987919993, CAG Branch, New Delhi (Code: 09996), on behalf of NTPC. Candidate must approach the nearby SBI branch with a printout of the "pay-in-slip" available on the application portal. Journal Number and Branch Code issued by the bank to be filled during online application.

NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

In order to restrict the number of candidates for further selection process, the management reserves the right to conduct a multi-stage selection process which may comprise of application shortlisting/screening (based on qualification/percentage of marks etc.), written/computer-based test, personal interview etc., or combination of the above, or raise the minimum eligibility standards/criteria as per requirement. In case of selection by written/computer-based test and interview, it shall be based on 85% weightage of online written test marks and 15% weightage of interview marks. The candidate must qualify separately in both the online written test and interview. The mere fact that a candidate is fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria would not bestow on them the right to be shortlisted/called for written test/Interview.

Stage Details
Stage 1 – Application Shortlisting / Screening (if required) Based on qualification/percentage of marks or other criteria as decided by management.
Stage 2 – Online Written Test Two parts: (i) Subject Knowledge Test (SKT); (ii) Executive Aptitude Test (EAT). Candidates must qualify in both sections separately. Weightage: 85% of written test marks (if interview is also conducted).
Stage 3 – Interview (if conducted) Weightage: 15% of interview marks. Candidate must qualify separately in both online written test and interview.
Stage 4 – Pre-employment Medical Examination Before joining, candidates must undergo medical examination by NTPC Medical Board/Officer. Decision of NTPC Medical Board/Officer will be final and binding. No relaxation in prescribed health standards is allowed.

How to Apply for NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026

Interested candidates should log on to the official NTPC careers website at careers.ntpc.co.in or visit the careers section at www.ntpc.co.in to apply. No other means/mode of application shall be accepted. Candidates are required to possess a valid email ID. NTPC will not be responsible for bouncing of any email sent to the candidates. After applying online, the candidate is required to download the application slip generated by the system with unique application number. Copy of application slip may be retained for future reference. No document is required to be sent to NTPC by post.

Candidates must upload all documents while applying - applications with incomplete/insufficient documents are liable to be rejected/not considered for further process. Candidates are required to indicate their choice of test centres at the time of online application and no change in test centres in any circumstance will be considered subsequently. However, NTPC reserves the right to cancel/add/change any centre. Posting shall be at any of the Offices/Stations/Projects/JVs/Subsidiaries of NTPC - all posts are transferable at the sole discretion of the Management.

List of Documents to be Uploaded While Applying:

  • Class X passing certificate/Marksheet - for Name and DOB proof (Name & DOB should appear in conformity on all documents)
  • PAN Card and Aadhaar Card
  • Graduate Engineering Degree in Environment/PG Degree/PG Diploma/M.Sc./M.Tech in Environment Engineering/Environment Science/Environmental Management/M.Tech with specialisation in Environment Engg/Environment Science/Environmental Management - Final/Provisional Certificate for both Graduation and Post Graduation
  • Consolidated Marksheet/Transcript of all semester marksheets clearly indicating aggregate % of marks in all semesters - for both Graduation and Post Graduation
  • Marks conversion formula from the university/Institute for conversion of marks in CPGA/CGPI/DGPA/CGI/CPI etc. into percentage (%)
  • Caste/Disability certificate (for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD/EWS candidates) as applicable
  • OBC-NCL certificate in central format for the current financial year (FY 2026-27)
  • EWS candidates - current year Income & Asset certificate in the prescribed format valid for FY 2026-27 based on the income of FY 2025-26
  • Disability certificate as per the latest prescribed central Govt. format generated online through the Swavalamban/UDID portal (clearly indicating the type and percentage of disability) in line with the identified disability for the post

Apply Online at: https://careers.ntpc.co.in

Important Instructions for NTPC Assistant Officer (Environment Management) Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply.
  • All qualifications should be full-time from Universities/Institutions recognized and approved in India.
  • The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed and no benefit of other category will be admissible later.
  • Candidates must upload all documents while applying - applications with incomplete/insufficient documents are liable to be rejected/not considered for further process.
  • Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances - candidates must verify eligibility before paying the application fee.
  • After applying online, candidates must download the application slip with unique application number for future reference.
  • OBC-NCL certificate must be in central format for the current financial year (FY 2026-27); EWS Income & Asset certificate must be valid for FY 2026-27 based on income of FY 2025-26.
  • Candidates are required to indicate their choice of test centres at the time of online application - no change will be considered subsequently.
  • Before joining, candidates must undergo medical examination by NTPC Medical Board/Officer. No relaxation in prescribed health standards is allowed. Detailed medical norms are available on careers.ntpc.co.in.
  • Posting shall be at any of the Offices/Stations/Projects/JVs/Subsidiaries of NTPC - all posts are transferable at the sole discretion of the Management.
  • Any proceedings in respect of any matter of claim or dispute arising out of this advertisement can be instituted only in Delhi and courts/tribunals/forums at Delhi only shall have sole and exclusive jurisdiction.
  • Canvassing in any form shall disqualify the candidate.
  • In case of any ambiguity/dispute on account of interpretation in versions other than English, the English version will prevail.
  • Any further addendum/corrigendum/updates will only be published on the official NTPC website.

The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT) has released the official FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment Notification 2026 on 07 May 2026 at www.fact.co.in. A total of 34 post codes across Draughtsman, Senior Draughtsman, Engineer Design, Deputy Manager, Senior Manager, and Assistant General Manager positions have been announced under the FACT FEDO Engineering Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates meeting the age criteria as of 01 May 2026 and holding the required qualifications in the respective engineering disciplines can apply online from 07 May 2026 to 21 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below

FOLLOW US

FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT), a Schedule 'A' multi-divisional Central PSU, has officially released Recruitment Notification No. 01/2026 dated 07/05/2026 for preparation of panel for engagement on temporary contract basis in FACT Engineering and Design Organisation (FEDO) or in any projects of FACT/FEDO. The notification covers 34 post codes spanning Draughtsman (Chemical, Mechanical-Piping, Electrical, Instrumentation, Civil), Senior Draughtsman (Civil), Engineer Design (Process, Piping, Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation, Civil, Estimation), Deputy Manager, Senior Manager, and Assistant General Manager levels across all engineering disciplines. The notification includes complete details on post specifications, experience levels, age limits, remuneration, selection process, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification carefully before applying. The notification is available on the official FACT website.

  • Download FACT FEDO Engineering Recruitment Notification 01/2026 Official PDF

FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT), Schedule 'A' multi-divisional Central PSU
Recruitment Notification No. 01/2026 dated 07/05/2026
Organisation / Project FACT Engineering and Design Organisation (FEDO) or any projects of FACT/FEDO
Post Codes Post Codes 1 to 34 - Draughtsman, Senior Draughtsman, Engineer Design, Deputy Manager Design, Senior Manager Design, Assistant General Manager Design (across Chemical, Mechanical-Piping, Electrical, Instrumentation, Civil, and Estimation disciplines)
Type of Engagement Temporary Contract basis - for a term of 1 year or till completion of project, whichever is earlier; renewable at Management's discretion
Application Mode Online Form submission + Physical Application by Speed Post/Registered Post

FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details & Specifications

Applications are invited for preparation of panel for 34 post codes across engineering and design disciplines for engagement in FEDO or any projects of FACT/FEDO on temporary contract basis. Merit lists for each post will be prepared separately for UR, SC, ST, OBC, and EWS categories and therefore candidates belonging to all categories are encouraged to apply.

For all post codes 1 to 34, one year Apprenticeship training for prescribed qualification in the relevant area of experience will also be considered as experience on production of Certificate of Proficiency (COP) issued by the Board of Apprenticeship Training. Candidates shall be willing to work at Site based on project requirements. Candidates may apply for one or more specified experience levels as applicable for each post.

Post Code Post Name Minimum Qualification Experience Required
1 Draughtsman (Chemical) Diploma in Chemical Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in Design & Drafting of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia project drawings using AutoCAD.
2 Draughtsman (Mechanical-Piping) Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in Design & Drafting of piping drawings using AutoCAD for projects in Oil & Gas/Fertiliser/Chemical industries; experience in preparation of layouts, Key plans, Isometric drawings, bill of quantities etc. (Knowledge in 3D modeling using Cardworx plant software is desirable).
3 Draughtsman (Electrical) Diploma in Electrical/Electrical and Electronics Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in preparation of single line diagram, General arrangement drawings of substation buildings, power layout, earthing layout, lighting layout etc. using CAD software and preparation of BOQ for erection tenders.
4 Draughtsman (Instrumentation) Diploma in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in preparation of engineering drawings using CAD software and preparation of BOQ for erection tenders.
5 Draughtsman (Civil) Diploma in Civil Engineering/Architecture (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 / (d) 5 years experience in preparation of Civil general arrangement/Structural drawings of RCC or Steel Structures using CAD software.
6 Sr. Draughtsman (Civil) Diploma in Civil Engineering/Architecture (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in preparation of Civil general arrangement/Structural drawings of RCC or Steel Structures using CAD software.
7 Engineer Design (Process) Degree in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Petrochemical Technology/Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering/Polymer Technology (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in Process Design and Detailing Engineering involving preparation of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in the field of Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia projects. Hands on experience in process simulation and/or design software will be an added advantage.
8 Engineer (Design Piping) Degree in Mechanical Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in developing piping layouts, equipment layouts, piping isometrics, material take-offs (MTO), and preparing technical procurement specifications for piping materials. Experience in ASME Code B31.3 is desirable; knowledge of AutoCAD preferred.
9 Engineer (Design-Mechanical) Degree in Mechanical Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in design consultancy/EPCs in basic Engineering of Machinery such as pumps, compressors etc. Proficient in finalization of Procurement specifications, tender documents, BOQ and review of vendor documents/drawings.
10 Engineer Design (Electrical) Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in an engineering consultancy firm in designing EHV/HV power distribution system, sizing calculations, earthing system, lightning protection, lighting, BOQ for erection contract, procurement specifications, vendor drawing review. Basic knowledge in drawing SLD, power and earthing layout in AutoCAD required.
11 Engineer Design (Instrumentation) Degree in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in design of instrumentation systems including field instruments, control system, automation projects; BOQ for erection contract, procurement specifications and vendor drawing review.
12 Engineer Design (Civil) Degree in Civil Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in Structural Design of RCC/Steel structures. Post-graduation in Structural Design is desirable. Proficient in STAAD-Pro or ETABS Software and Indian Design Codes.
13 Engineer Estimation (Civil) Degree in Civil Engineering (a) 1 / (b) 2 / (c) 3 years experience in Quantity Estimation/Measurements & Billing/Specification Preparation/Rate Analysis for Civil and RCC works.
14 Deputy Manager Design (Process) Degree in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Petrochemical Technology/Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering/Polymer Technology Minimum 5 years experience in Process Design and Detailing Engineering involving preparation of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in the field of Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia projects. Hands on experience in process simulation and/or design software will be an added advantage.
15 Deputy Manager (Design Piping) Degree in Mechanical Engineering Minimum 5 years experience in developing piping layouts, equipment layouts, piping isometrics, MTO, and preparing technical procurement specifications for piping materials. Experience in ASME Code B31.3 is desirable; knowledge of AutoCAD preferred.
16 Deputy Manager (Design-Mechanical) PCE Degree in Mechanical Engineering Minimum 5 years experience in design consultancy or EPC environment in design of static equipment such as Pressure Vessels, Storage Tanks, Heat Exchangers. Experience in ASME Sec VIII, API 650/620, TEMA codes is desirable. Proficiency in PV Elite, AME Tank and related tools required.
17 Deputy Manager Design (Electrical) Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering Minimum 5 years experience in an engineering consultancy firm in designing EHV/HV power distribution system, sizing calculations, earthing system, lightning protection, lighting, BOQ, procurement specifications, vendor drawing review. Basic knowledge in drawing SLD, power and earthing layout in AutoCAD required.
18 Deputy Manager Design (Instrumentation) Degree in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering Minimum 5 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in design of instrumentation systems including field instruments, control system, automation projects; BOQ, procurement specifications and vendor drawing review.
19 Deputy Manager Design (Civil) Degree in Civil Engineering Minimum 5 years experience in Structural Design of RCC/Steel structures. Post-graduation in Structural Design is desirable. Proficient in STAAD-Pro or ETABS Software and Indian Design Codes.
20 Deputy Manager Estimation (Civil) Degree in Civil Engineering Minimum 5 years experience in Quantity Estimation/Measurements & Billing/Specification Preparation/Rate Analysis for Civil and RCC works.
21 Senior Manager Design (Process) Degree in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Petrochemical Technology/Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering/Polymer Technology (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in Process Design and Detailing Engineering involving preparation of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in the field of Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia projects. Hands on experience in process simulation and/or design software will be an added advantage.
22 Senior Manager (Design Piping) Degree in Mechanical Engineering (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in developing piping layouts, equipment layouts, piping isometrics, MTO, and preparing technical procurement specifications for piping materials. Experience in ASME Code B31.3 is desirable; knowledge of AutoCAD preferred.
23 Senior Manager (Design-Mechanical) Degree in Mechanical Engineering (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in design consultancy/EPCs in basic Engineering of Machinery such as pumps, compressors etc. Proficient in finalization of Procurement specifications, tender documents, BOQ and review of vendor documents/drawings.
24 Senior Manager Design (Electrical) Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in an engineering consultancy firm in designing EHV/HV power distribution system, sizing calculations, earthing system, lightning protection, lighting, BOQ, procurement specifications, vendor drawing review. Basic knowledge in drawing SLD, power and earthing layout in AutoCAD required.
25 Senior Manager Design (Instrumentation) Degree in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in design of instrumentation systems including field instruments, control system, automation projects; BOQ, procurement specifications and vendor drawing review.
26 Senior Manager Design (Civil) Degree in Civil Engineering (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in Structural Design of RCC/Steel structures. Post-graduation in Structural Design is desirable. Proficient in STAAD-Pro or ETABS Software and Indian Design Codes.
27 Senior Manager Estimation (Civil) Degree in Civil Engineering (a) 8 / (b) 10 years experience in Quantity Estimation/Measurements & Billing/Specification Preparation/Rate Analysis for Civil and RCC works.
28 Assistant General Manager Design (Process) Degree in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology/Petrochemical Technology/Petroleum Refining & Petrochemical Engineering/Polymer Technology (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in Process Design and Detailing Engineering involving preparation of PFDs, P&IDs & Process Specifications in the field of Fertiliser/Refinery/Oil & Gas/Petrochemicals/CBG/Green Hydrogen/Green Ammonia projects. Hands on experience in process simulation and/or design software will be an added advantage.
29 Assistant General Manager (Design Piping) Degree in Mechanical Engineering (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in developing piping layouts, equipment layouts, piping isometrics, MTO, and preparing technical procurement specifications for piping materials. Experience in ASME Code B31.3 is desirable; knowledge of AutoCAD preferred.
30 Assistant General Manager (Design-Mechanical) Degree in Mechanical Engineering (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in design consultancy/EPCs in basic Engineering of Machinery such as pumps, compressors etc. Proficient in finalization of Procurement specifications, tender documents, BOQ and review of vendor documents/drawings.
31 Assistant General Manager Design (Electrical) Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in designing EHV/HV power distribution system, sizing calculations, earthing system, lightning protection, lighting, BOQ approvals, procurement specifications, vendor drawing review.
32 Assistant General Manager Design (Instrumentation) Degree in Instrumentation/Instrumentation & Control/Electronics & Instrumentation/Electrical & Instrumentation Engineering (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in an engineering consultancy or EPC firm in design of instrumentation systems including field instruments, control system, automation projects; BOQ, procurement specifications and vendor drawing review.
33 Assistant General Manager Design (Civil) Degree in Civil Engineering (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in Structural Design of RCC/Steel structures. Post-graduation in Structural Design is desirable. Proficient in STAAD-Pro or ETABS Software and Indian Design Codes.
34 Assistant General Manager Estimation (Civil) Degree in Civil Engineering (a) 12 / (b) 15 years experience in Quantity Estimation/Measurements & Billing/Specification Preparation/Rate Analysis for Civil and RCC works.

FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

The relevant date to determine eligibility on experience and age is 01.05.2026. Std X certificate having date of birth shall only be considered as proof of date of birth. Relaxation in maximum age limit is permissible for reserved posts as per Government directives.

Post Category Post Codes Maximum Age (as on 01.05.2026) Date of Birth Range
Draughtsman / Engineer / Deputy Manager 1 to 5 and 7 to 20 35 Years Born between 01.05.1991 and 30.04.2008
Senior Draughtsman / Senior Manager 6 and 21 to 27 45 Years Born between 01.05.1981 and 30.04.2008
Assistant General Manager 28 to 34 50 Years Born between 01.05.1976 and 30.04.2008

FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 - Remuneration

The remuneration for the posts will be on consolidated basis as detailed below. Payment of higher consolidated pay will be considered for those with higher relevant experience, at a rate of 3% for each completed year of additional relevant experience over and above the minimum experience given under 'Specification' of each Post, subject to the maximum consolidated pay indicated. An annual increase of 3% on applicable consolidated pay will be paid, subject to renewal of contract engagement.

Post / Experience Level Consolidated Pay (Rs.) Maximum Consolidated Pay (Rs.)
Draughtsman (1 year experience) 25,750 32,660
Draughtsman (2 year experience) 26,530 33,640
Draughtsman (3 year experience) 27,330 34,650
Draughtsman (5 year experience) 29,000 36,770
Senior Draughtsman (8 year experience) 31,700 40,200
Senior Draughtsman (10 year experience) 34,650 42,660
Engineer Design in all discipline/Estimation (Civil) (1 year experience) 35,520 44,400
Engineer Design in all discipline/Estimation (Civil) (2 year experience) 36,590 45,740
Engineer Design in all discipline/Estimation (Civil) (3 year experience) 37,690 47,120
Deputy Manager Design in all discipline/Estimation (Civil) (5 year experience) 40,000 50,000
Senior Manager Design in all discipline/Estimation (Civil) (8 year experience) 43,720 54,650
Senior Manager Design in all discipline/Estimation (Civil) (10 year experience) 46,400 57,980
Assistant General Manager Design in all discipline/Estimation (Civil) (12 year experience) 49,240 61,520
Assistant General Manager Design in all discipline/Estimation (Civil) (15 year experience) 53,820 67,240

FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The decision of the Management about the mode of selection, requirements, eligibility criteria, shortlisting of candidates etc. shall be final and binding. No correspondence will be entertained in this regard. Meeting the eligibility criteria or attending or being successful in skill test/interview does not by itself confer any right on the candidate for selection or inclusion in the Panel.

Post Codes Mode of Selection Details
1 to 6 (Draughtsman / Senior Draughtsman) Skill Test in Engineering Drafting Software Candidates successful in the practical/skill test will be assessed and ranked on basis of marks scored. Tie-breaking criteria (in order): (a) Completed years of relevant experience; (b) Earlier year of passing the relevant qualification (Diploma certificate); (c) Earlier date of birth.
7 to 34 (Engineer / Deputy Manager / Senior Manager / AGM) Interview Selection will be based on marks scored in the Interview.

How to Apply for FACT FEDO Engineering Contract Recruitment 2026

Candidates must complete a two-step application process. Step 1: Submit Online Form and upload Application Form (in prescribed format available on website along with notification - printed, manually filled, signed, photo affixed and uploaded in PDF format) on or before 4:00 PM on 21.05.2026 via the Online Registration link at www.fact.co.in >> Careers >> Job Openings >> Recruitment Notification 01/2026. Step 2: Send the original Application Form uploaded along with all relevant certificates/documents by Speed Post/Registered Post so as to reach FACT on or before 28.05.2026.

Candidates wishing to apply for more than one post must submit separate online applications and send separate applications with connected documents to the HR Department for each post. Envelope containing the application shall be superscribed with "Application for the post of (___) - Ad.01/2026." Application received by post without submitting Online Form, or Online Form submitted without uploading prescribed Application Form, or not receiving Application by post, or Application received late, will not be considered.

Documents to be Sent by Speed Post/Registered Post along with Original Application Form (self-attested copies):

  • Proof of Date of Birth - Std X certificate with date of birth or Birth Certificate
  • Certificates to prove educational qualification from Std X onwards - both marksheet and Pass Certificate
  • Certificates to prove relevant experience as mentioned in the Application Form
  • Certificate of Proficiency (COP) issued by Board of Apprenticeship Training, if any
  • Apprenticeship Training completion certificate issued by Company, if any
  • Certificate showing proof of Caste/EWS/PWBD, for claiming reservation/relaxation, if any
  • Self Declaration by OBC-NCL candidates (in prescribed format available on website)
  • Aadhaar

Send by Speed Post/Registered Post to: DGM (HR), HR Department, FEDO Building, FACT, Udyogamandal, PIN – 683501 so as to reach on or before 28.05.2026.

Apply Online at: https://www.fact.co.in (Careers >> Job Openings >> Recruitment Notification 01/2026)

Important Instructions for FACT FEDO Engineering Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Two-step application is mandatory - both Online Form submission AND physical application by Speed Post/Registered Post are compulsory; failure of either step will result in rejection.
  • Only full-time regular courses will be considered for prescribed educational qualifications - qualifications acquired through part-time/correspondence/distance/private study/off campus will not be considered.
  • Only post-qualification experience will be considered for all posts. One year Apprenticeship training will also be considered as experience on production of COP issued by Board of Apprenticeship Training.
  • Candidates may apply for one or more of the specified experience levels and must indicate their preference - only the specific experience level(s) preferred in the application will be considered.
  • Candidates wishing to apply for more than one post must submit separate online applications and send separate applications with documents to HR for each post.
  • Candidates shall be willing to work at Site based on project requirements.
  • Engagement is only for fixed term against specific projects and will not confer any right for extension, permanent appointment, or preferential treatment in any future appointment.
  • Candidates already engaged in FACT as work charged employees in a particular project shall not be considered for appointment from a new merit panel.
  • EWS candidates shall submit EWS certificate of relevant year (income of 2025-26). OBC-NCL candidates shall submit OBC-NCL certificate and self-declaration along with application.
  • Candidates will be required to undergo pre-employment medical examination - only those certified fit by the Company's Medical Officer will be offered appointment. No relaxation in Medical/Physical standards will be allowed.
  • All further notifications shall be through the Company website www.fact.co.in - individual communications may not be sent; all communications will be only through the email ID used for submitting Online Form. Candidates must keep the said email ID valid and functional at all times.
  • Any dispute with regard to recruitment against this notification will be settled in courts within the jurisdiction of Ernakulam, Kerala State only.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS), Regional Office Patna has invited online applications for engagement of PGTs, TGTs, Creative Teachers and Staff Nurse on a purely contractual basis in Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas (JNVs) under Patna Region for the academic session 2026-27. The recruitment is for JNVs located in the states of Bihar, Jharkhand and West Bengal. Eligible and interested candidates can submit their applications online from 08 May 2026 to 15 May 2026. Selected candidates will be engaged on contract basis and posted in any JNV under Patna Region. It is mandatory for selected teachers to reside in the Vidyalaya campus. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

FOLLOW US

NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026 Notification

Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti, Regional Office Patna has released the official notification for empanelment and engagement of Post Graduate Teachers (PGTs), Trained Graduate Teachers (TGTs), Creative Teachers and Staff Nurse on contractual basis for the session 2026-27. The detailed notification, educational qualifications, remuneration, age criteria and selection process are available on the official website of NVS RO Patna. Candidates are advised to read the full notification carefully before applying.

  • Download NVS Patna Region Contractual Teacher Recruitment 2026 Notification
  • Apply Link for NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026

NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS), Regional Office Patna
Post Name PGTs, TGTs, Creative Teachers & Staff Nurse (Contractual)
States Covered Bihar, Jharkhand & West Bengal
Engagement Type Purely Contractual for Academic Session 2026-27
Application Mode Online only
Online Application Period 08 May 2026 to 15 May 2026
Official Website https://navodaya.gov.in/nvs/ro/Patna/en/home/

NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Activity Date
Issue of Notification 08 May 2026
Online Application Start & Last Date 08 May 2026 to 15 May 2026
Scrutiny / Verification of Applications 16 May 2026
Communication to Shortlisted Candidates 18 May 2026
Date of Personal Interaction / Interview 21 May 2026 to 23 May 2026

NVS Patna Region - Vacancy Details

Vacancies are available for the following posts (exact number will depend on requirement in JNVs of Bihar, Jharkhand & West Bengal):

  • PGTs: Hindi, English, Physics, Chemistry, Maths, Biology, History, Geography, Economics, Commerce, Computer Science, Bengali, Physical Education etc.
  • TGTs: Hindi, English, Maths, Science, Social Science, Computer Science, Art, Music, Librarian, Physical Education (Male/Female), 3rd Language (Bengali/Urdu) etc.
  • Others: Special Educator, Vocational Teacher (Hospitality & Tourism), Staff Nurse.

NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Remuneration

Post Normal Station (per month) Hard Station (per month)
PGTs Rs. 35,750/- Rs. 42,250/-
TGTs & Librarian Rs. 34,125/- Rs. 40,625/-
Staff Nurse Rs. 34,125/- Rs. 40,625/-

NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

  • PGTs / TGTs / Creative Teachers: Maximum 50 years as on 01 June 2026.
  • Female Staff Nurse: Not exceeding 35 years as on 01 June 2026.
  • Ex-NVS Superannuated Teachers: Maximum 65 years as on 01 June 2026.

NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

For PGTs:

  • Master’s Degree in concerned subject with at least 50% marks + B.Ed. from NCTE recognized institution.
  • Proficiency in teaching in English & Hindi medium.

For TGTs:

  • Bachelor’s Degree with concerned subject + B.Ed. with minimum 50% marks.
  • Qualified in CTET (Paper-II).

For Staff Nurse:

  • B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing + Registration with State Nursing Council + 2½ years experience in minimum 50-bedded hospital.

Desirable Qualifications (common for most posts):

  • Experience in residential / Navodaya schools.
  • Knowledge of Computer Applications.
  • Proficiency in regional languages.

How to Apply for NVS Patna Region Teacher Recruitment 2026

  1. Visit Official Portal Go to www.trschooms.in (link will be activated on NVS RO Patna website).
  2. Register & Fill Application Register with valid email ID and mobile number. Fill personal, educational and experience details carefully.
  3. Upload Documents Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, educational certificates, experience certificates, CTET certificate, caste certificate (if applicable) etc.
  4. Submit Application Review the form and submit online before 15 May 2026. Take printout of the submitted application.
  5. Prepare for Personal Interaction Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for document verification and personal interaction scheduled between 21 to 23 May 2026 at designated JNVs (Rajgir, Ranchi & Paschim Burdwan).
  6. Attend Personal Interaction Report at the allotted venue with all original documents and self-attested photocopies on the scheduled date.

Important Instructions for Candidates

  • Engagement is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular appointment.
  • Selected candidates must reside in the JNV campus.
  • State-wise merit list will be prepared for posting.
  • Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.
  • Visit NVS RO Patna website regularly for updates.
